channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Amador Valley rally falls short in CIF Division 3-AA championship game defeat
item.description: Amador Valley's final drive results in turnover on downs as Frontier-Bakersfield wins 3-AA state title.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Behind program-record 18 3-pointers, Cal takes down Stanford with largest Big Game margin of victory in 42 years
item.description: Cal women's basketball beat Stanford 83-63 at Haas Pavilion in Berkeley, snapping a 12-game losing streak against the Cardinal and getting its first win in the Big Game series since 2019
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Cubs acquire All-Star outfielder Kyle Tucker in trade with the Astros
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — The Chicago Cubs acquired All-Star outfielder Kyle Tucker in a trade with the Houston Astros on Friday, paying a big price for one of baseball's best hitters.
item.dc:creator: JAY COHEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NJ Catholic high school makes history with fourth state football title
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) — It is that time of the week, New York’s very own, when PIX11’s Perry Sook features one of the best and brightest local student-athletes. Bergen Catholic has completed a historic four-peat in high school football.
item.dc:creator: Perry Sook, PIX 11

item.title: Pro Football Hall of Famer Randy Moss reveals cancer diagnosis, 6-hour surgery
item.description: Pro Football Hall of Fame wide receiver Randy Moss said Friday he is being treated for cancer and is recovering from major surgery. In an appearance on Instagram Live, Moss, aided by a cane, introduced himself as a cancer survivor and thanked his “prayer warriors” for their support.
item.dc:creator: ZACH ALLEN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Game-worn Wilt Chamberlain Lakers jersey sells for $333K at auction
item.description: A game-worn Wilt Chamberlain jersey from the 1970-71 Los Angeles Lakers playoff run sold for $333,601 at Grey Flannel Auctions’ holiday auction this weekend.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: De'Vondre Campbell won't be part of the 49ers after his refusal to enter a game, Kyle Shanahan says
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — San Francisco coach Kyle Shanahan said linebacker De'Vondre Campbell won't be part of the 49ers moving forward after he refused to enter a game after losing his starting job.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 49ers to sever ties with De’Vondre Campbell after Thursday night walkout
item.description: Linebacker De'Vondre Campbell's refusal to play in the 49ers' loss Thursday night will result in his termination from the team, coach Kyle Shanahan said Friday.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: UNC alum files for 2-word trademark after Bill Belichick becomes head coach
item.description: As a new era begins in Chapel Hill, North Carolina, one UNC alum is taking advantage of the opportunity with a perfect two-word trademark for the occasion.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: UNLV hires former Florida and Mississippi State head coach Dan Mullen as its new football coach
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — UNLV is reaching into the Southeastern Conference to keep momentum going for its 24th-ranked football team, hiring former Florida and Mississippi State coach Dan Mullen on Thursday. He will be introduced in a news conference Friday morning.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Raiders player Charles Snowden facing misdemeanor DUI charge after Las Vegas arrest
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Las Vegas officers found Raiders football player Charles Snowden “passed out” behind the wheel of a Jeep Cherokee, its engine running as it balanced atop a retaining wall, before his arrest on a misdemeanor charge of driving under the influence of alcohol, according to a police repo
item.dc:creator: KEN RITTER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Astros think Yankees have offered 'crap' for All-Star trade target: report
item.description: The New York Yankees and Houston Astros have been in trade talks about outfielder Kyle Tucker, but they remain far apart on an agreement, according to a report.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: With Dybantsa in the house, BYU blasts Fresno State
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The highest rated recruit in BYU basketball history was at the Marriott Center Wednesday to watch his future team cruise to victory. AJ Dybantsa was witness to a 28-point drubbing by the Cougars over Fresno State, 95-67.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Rocky Colavito, 9-time All-Star outfielder and one of Cleveland's most popular athletes, dies at 91
item.description: Rocky Colavito, a wildly popular outfielder who was involved in one of the most debated trades in Cleveland sports history, has died. He was 91.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: Girls Basketball: Clairemont 24, Preuss 18
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Girls basketball in Clairemont with Preuss dribbling against the Chieftains. A low scoring defensive game went the way for the home team with Clairemont winning 24-18.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: Arlington Heights village board unanimously approves tax deal with Bears, 3 local school districts
item.description: The Village of Arlington Heights Board of Trustees is set to vote on a tentative property tax deal with the Chicago Bears and three local school districts, which would save the Bears $5.4 million a year in property taxes and establish a timeline for the Bears to decide on building a new stadium in t
item.dc:creator: Dana Rebik, WGN 9

item.title: How to watch 'Monday Night Football' in 'The Simpsons' universe
item.description: The prime-time matchup between the Cincinnati Bengals and Dallas Cowboys will also take place at Springfield’s Atoms Stadium as part of “The Simpsons Funday Football” alternate broadcast.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: CU Buffaloes & CSU Rams are bowl eligible
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— If you're struggling to remember, you're not alone. But the University of Colorado and Colorado State University are changing that narrative this year. For the first time since 2016, both Colorado schools are bowling this postseason. First up, No. 23 Colorado.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Dodgers reach $17M, 1-year deal with Conforto and $22M, 2-year contract with Treinen, AP sources say
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — The Los Angeles Dodgers agreed to a $17 million, one-year contract to add outfielder Michael Conforto and a $22 million, two-year deal to retain right-hander Blake Treinen, people familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 49ers beat the Bears 38-13 to snap 3-game skid
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — After weeks of shaky play, the San Francisco 49ers got back to their old form with one of the most dominant first halves in years.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Saints QB Derek Carr injures left hand on dive in 4th quarter of win over Giants
item.description: New Orleans Saints quarterback Derek Carr injured his left hand late in the fourth quarter of Sunday's 14-11 victory over the New York Giants when he went airborne while trying for a first down and crashed to the turf.
item.dc:creator: TOM CANAVAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utes QB Isaac Wilson enters transfer portal
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Utes freshman quarterback Isaac Wilson announced on Sunday that he is entering the transfer portal after one season. Wilson threw for 1,510 yards and 10 touchdowns as a freshman, starting seven games in place of injured starter Cam Rising.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Baltimore Orioles reach $49.5M, 3-year deal with OF Tyler O'Neill, AP source says
item.description: The Baltimore Orioles have agreed to a $49.5 million, three-year contract with outfielder Tyler O'Neill, according to a person familiar with the negotiations. The person spoke to The Associated Press on Saturday on condition of anonymity because the agreement was subject to a successful physical.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jokic's career high of 56 points comes during a low point for the Nuggets
item.description: Nikola Jokic scored a career-high 56 points and had little to celebrate afterward. It happened in a loss — to a team that hadn't won since October.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Anders Sorensen loses 1st game as interim Blackhawks coach
item.description: Anders Sorensen's first game with Chicago looked a lot like when Luke Richardson was coaching the Blackhawks.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Haliburton scores 23 points as the Pacers beat the Bulls 132-123
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Tyrese Haliburton had 23 points and eight assists, and the Indiana Pacers stopped a four-game slide with a 132-123 victory over the Chicago Bulls on Friday night. Pascal Siakam scored 21 points for Indiana, and Bennedict Mathurin finished with 19.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
